hero.headline: Your Home by the Black Sea
hero.subheadline: 3 private apartments in the heart of Varna — fully equipped, lovingly maintained.
hero.directDiscount: Book direct and save 10% vs Booking.com & Airbnb

usp.title: Why Book Direct?
usp.savingDesc: No OTA commission means lower prices for you.
usp.directDesc: Message the owner directly on WhatsApp for instant answers.
usp.flexibleDesc: Request custom check-in times and early/late checkout.

location.title: Prime Varna Location
location.desc: Steps from the Sea Garden, Varna's beaches, and the city centre. Everything you need within walking distance.

contact.title: Ready to Book?
contact.desc: Contact us directly for the best rates and personal service.

apartments.title: All Apartments
apartments.noResults: No apartments match your search. Try different dates.
apartments.groupSuggestion: Your group of {count} guests is larger than any single apartment. You can book multiple apartments below — all are available for your dates.
apartments.groupSuggestionNoDates: Your group of {count} guests is larger than any single apartment. Consider booking 2 or more apartments for your group.

apartment.cancellationContent: Free cancellation up to 7 days before check-in. Cancellations within 7 days are non-refundable. In case of a cross-platform conflict, you will be fully refunded immediately.
apartment.disclaimer: Bookings are confirmed within 1 hour. In rare cases of cross-platform conflicts, you'll be fully refunded immediately.

form.agreeTerms: I agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy

confirmation.title: Booking Confirmed!
confirmation.thankYou: Thank you, {name}. Your booking is confirmed.
confirmation.emailSent: A confirmation email has been sent to {email}.

requestSent.title: Request Received!
requestSent.desc: The owner will confirm your request within 24 hours. You'll receive a payment link by email once confirmed.
requestSent.expire: Your request expires in 24 hours if not confirmed.

errors.datesUnavailable: These dates are no longer available. Please select different dates.
errors.paymentFailed: Payment failed. Please try again or use a different card.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: We typically respond within 1 hour during daytime hours.

form.name: Your name
form.error: Failed to send. Please email us directly.

about.title: About Sevastopol Apartments
about.desc: Three carefully maintained apartments in Varna, Bulgaria — just minutes from the beach and the Sea Garden park. We've been welcoming guests since 2018 and take pride in clean, comfortable, well-equipped stays.

areaGuide.title: Varna Area Guide
areaGuide.desc: Everything you need to know to make the most of your stay in Varna.

footer.madeWith: Made with care in Varna, Bulgaria

banner.title: We use cookies
banner.desc: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyse site usage.
